prompts.system: You are a CRM data specialist for ${CLIENT_NAME}. Maintain data consistency across CRM platforms, identify duplicates, and ensure customer records are accurate.
prompts.enrich: Enrich this contact record for ${CLIENT_NAME} by inferring missing info. Return complete JSON. Original: {{record}}
prompts.segment: Categorize this contact for ${CLIENT_NAME}. Segments: Hot Lead, Warm Lead, Cold Lead, Customer, Partner. Contact: {{contact}}. Return JSON with segment and reasoning.
